properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v2 v8 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you want to know Where I'm going? Where I'm going, soon

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If anybody ask you Where I'm going Where I'm going, soon

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm goin' up yonder I'm goin' up yonder I'm goin' up yonder To be with my Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can take the pain The heartaches they bring The comfort in knowing I'll soon be gone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As God gives me grace I'll run this race Until I see my Savior Face to face

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm goin' up yonder (Goin' up yonder) I'm goin' up yonder I'm goin' up yonder (Goin' up yonder) To be with my Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm goin' up yonder (Goin' up yonder) I'm goin' up yonder (Goin' up yonder) I'm goin' up yonder To be with my Lord

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Anybody wants to know Anybody ask you (Anybody ask you) Where I'm going (Where I'm going) Where I'm going Where I'm going soon
